name: SmartContext — Intelligent Conversation Guidelines
description: Injects domain-specific, tiered guidelines into each conversation to help LLM prioritize and focus on what's important.

roleTags.description: User role tags (e.g., frontend, backend, architect)

pinnedItems.description: User manually marked important content (Tier 0 always prioritized)

activeDomains.label: Active Domains
activeDomains.help: Specify domains to enable, only rules from specified domains will take effect

roleTags.label: Role Tags
roleTags.help: Set user role to adjust focus priority for different information types
